text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
/* I still haven't been able to resolve the errors
Parcae keeps giving me. It remains impossible to
calculate my chances of winning after the Kikuka
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
I've made revisions to my training regimen. My
growth during this camp is inextricably linked to
my future performances. I'm going to do
everything I can to prepare for the Kikuka Sho. */
